key_learnings: High sugar intake in the evening is associated with reduced sleep quality.
research_findings: Tryptophan-rich foods consumed at dinner correlate with improved sleep onset.
current_focus_areas: Mapping bidirectional relationships between dietary patterns and sleep quality metrics.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Analysed evening diet patterns and their correlation with sleep onset and quality metrics. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.
